title: Priorities
content:
I know this thing feels off and new but i am writing this after i got a little bit of accident in my working place, while i was so eager to make money and being independent. Sometimes we gotta give ourselves a time for our health and our mind, my little accident was the janitor was sweeping the floor while i am out from the lift, and the floor was so slippery that i found myself at the floor without me knowing. I am writing this while i am having a simple headache, sleepy and yawning morethan the usual, google and gpt said its concussion, i will go to clinic soon and all, but why am here is that to say "lets give time for ourselves and lets take care of our mind and health!" 
-what i realized is that the more i try to make money the more God make me humbled, I was in a bad situation where i ask myself while everybody is making some money and all, why i'm not getting while i am making more effort than them , they seem they are lucky or what? or is it i have to wait my time? or something else? i was in that situation trying to make sense of it, but at the end i understood that there is much morethan that......*Health* yeah Health everything we own is something precious and unique......... i wasnt blind ik this thing but i couldnt appreciate this things when i was only thinking about money and getting rich asap... iw as more focused on the fictional things that i can achieve rather than looking at myself, my family and the persons beside me.
- The points may seem vague and unclear, addition to that they seem absurd... But take care of urself guys...

                    "No such thing as a life that's better than yours!" J-cole(*I love him guys*)
